name: Simran Kaur
summary: Backend-focused Software Engineer with 1.5 years of experience in Python and Django. Built REST APIs for two early-stage startups. Solid grasp of SQL and API integration. Comfortable working in fast-paced Agile environments. Currently looking to move into a product-based company.

education.institution: Thapar Institute of Engineering & Technology, Patiala

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed 5 REST API modules using Django REST Framework for a B2B HR SaaS product.
Optimized 12 slow SQL queries reducing average response time from 2.1s to 340ms.
Integrated third-party APIs (WhatsApp Business, SendGrid, Razorpay) into the platform.
Wrote API documentation using Swagger/OpenAPI for 30+ endpoints.
Assisted in migrating legacy MySQL schema to PostgreSQL with zero data loss.

experience.title: Backend Intern
responsibilities: Built CRUD APIs for a logistics tracking system using Flask and MySQL.
Wrote Bash scripts to automate daily database backups.
Participated in code reviews and fixed 20+ bugs across the codebase.

projects.name: QuickShip – Logistics Tracking Dashboard
projects.description: Built a logistics tracking system with real-time shipment status updates using Celery beat tasks and Redis pub/sub. Handles 500 daily orders.

projects.name: DevBlog API
projects.description: Built a blogging platform REST API with Markdown rendering, JWT auth, tagging, and full-text search using pg_trgm.

achievements: Employee of the Month – HireIn Technologies (March 2023)
Thapar Coding League – Top 20 finisher (350+ participants)
